description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a light gray exterior and a dark gray gable roof. The front facade features a centered entry door with a small overhang and two windows with shutters on either side. The house has a symmetrical window arrangement on the front and rear, with additional windows on the sides for natural light. The roof is steeply pitched and extends over a small side section, suggesting an L-shaped floor plan. The exterior walls appear to be clad in horizontal siding, and the windows are double-hung with white framing. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of American ranch or cottage-style homes.
description: A light gray, single-story house with a dark gable roof, symmetrical windows, and a centered front door with a small overhang. The design is simple and suburban, with horizontal siding and white window frames.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, two shuttered windows, and a small overhang above the door.
description_view_1: Angled front view highlighting the centered door, symmetrical windows, and the gable roof's pitch.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying three evenly spaced windows and the full expanse of the roof.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the side extension of the roof and three rear windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Centered single door with a small overhang, flanked by shuttered windows, no porch or columns.
